result:
All 484 assertions pass. Summary of bugs fixed across the 13 modules:

- **catalog.rkt**: `product-margin` operand swap (price - cost)
- **customers.rkt**: `tier-discount-pct` swapped gold/bronze values
- **inventory.rkt**: `reorder-needed` comparator flip (`<` for below minimum)
- **shipping.rkt**: `carrier-total-cost` wrong accessor (`base-rate` not `id`); `zone-surcharge` operator (`*` not `+`); `shipping-cost-for-order` literal `"pending"` → `order-id`
- **orders.rkt**: `calculate-tax` extra `* 2`; `calculate-total` used `+` instead of `-` for discount; `customer-discount-pct` used `customer-id` instead of `customer-tier`
- **billing.rkt**: `create-invoice` called `(cust/customer-id)` with no args; `invoices-for-customer` used `invoice-order-id` instead of `invoice-customer-id`
- **procurement.rkt**: `poline-total` used `+` instead of `*`; `lines-for-product` used `supplierid-value` for product comparison
- **promotions.rkt**: `campaign-active?` used `campaign-id` for start-date; percentage discount divided by 10 (not 100); `customer-eligible?` used `customer-id` instead of `customer-tier`
- **employees.rkt**: `find-employee-by-id` used `employee-hire-date`; `line-commission` used `+` instead of `*`; `total-commission` passed `(employee-name o)` as the employee-id
- **audit.rkt**: `audit-order` used `order-customer-id` for entity-id; `audit-shipment` used `shipment-status` for entity-id; `entries-in-period` used `>=` for end bound
- **analytics.rkt**: `revenue-by-period` called `orders-in-period` with 2 args
- **notifications.rkt**: `create-notification` omitted `reference-id` from `->Notification`
